message:
test(http2/hpack): add RFC 7541 vectors + table edge cases (bd-et96)

Adds a focused HPACK conformance layer via unit tests (no implementation changes).

- RFC 7541 C.1: integer representation (prefix enc/dec) including 10/42/1337 test vectors.
- RFC 7541 C.2/C.3: indexed header field + first request example without Huffman.
- Huffman decode sanity check for the spec-encoded "www.example.com".
- Encoder/decoder roundtrips with Huffman on/off.
- Dynamic table edge cases: empty table, FIFO indexing semantics, size accounting, and max_size=0 behavior.

These tests tighten our regression net for HPACK correctness and are intended to be reusable as we harden against DoS vectors.
